name: Debrid / Stremio streams
description: Stremio addon stream list as pickable sources + Real-Debrid/TorBox; IMDb or TMDB/TVDB (with TMDB API key) for id mapping.
overview: Lists each addon stream as its own Jellyfin source so you can pick a link. Resolves IMDb from metadata or TMDB/TVDB via optional TMDB API. Debrid playback. You must comply with applicable laws and service terms.
